intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 75%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First block at 95%. This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Starting sweet spot work. 95% just below FTP. You should maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Starting threshold work. This is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 95% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 2/20.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 16% through session. Rep 2/20. You've done 2min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/20. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1/4. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 115% for 1:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 2:00 at 95%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 2:00 at 95%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/4. 2:00 at 95%. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 95% for 2:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/4. 95% FTP, 90-95 rpm. Challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 4/20. 15 minutes in. Your mind wants to negotiate. Don't.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 4/20. 115% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 4/20. You're building something real here. 16 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 4/20. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 4/20. 115% FTP. Keep 90-95 rpm steady. Don't let form collapse.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/4. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 15 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 95% at 90-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Set 1: 2:00 at 95%. Every minute here makes you faster on race day.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold: where you live between motivation and regret. Currently: regret. Block 1/4.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 22% into session. Seated at 90-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 23 minutes of threshold work done. Block 2/4. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 31% through session. Block 2/4. You've done 8min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 2/4.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: nothing was fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2: 2:00 at 95%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 14 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 1:00 at 115%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2/4. Target 115% for 1:00. Next rest: 0:00.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 7/20. You're building something real here. 13 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2/4. The suffering is progressive, like a tax bracket.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 7/20. You've accumulated 10min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 2: 2:00 at 95%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 2: 2:00 at 95%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 2/4. 95% for 2:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 2/4. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2/4. 44 minutes left. Maintain focus. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 9/20. You're 38% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 9/20. 11 to go. You've accumulated 13min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 9/20. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 9/20. Only 11 more of these. 'Only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 2/4. 115%, 95-100 rpm. This is where your aerobic ceiling gets raised.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 41 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 29 minutes in. 95% at 95-100 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 10 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 55% for 5:00. Then 0:00 recovery. Execute now.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 50% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 34 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 36 minutes in. 95% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 50% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 9 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 50% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 50% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 52% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 115% for 1:00. Next up: 0:00 recovery, then 2min at 95%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 52% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 52% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 52% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 54% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 31 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 39 minutes in. 95% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 54% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 7 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 54% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 54% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 56% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Current: 115% FTP × 1:00. After rest, expect 95% for 2min. Plan accordingly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 56% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 56% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. 115% for 1:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 58% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 28 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 42 minutes in. 95% at 85-90 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 58% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 5 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 58% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 95%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 61% done. 0 intervals left. 23 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 4/4. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 4 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% through session. Block 4/4. You've done 24min of threshold work.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 49 minutes of quality work done. This is where champions separate from the pack.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 49 minutes in. Your lactate threshold called. It's filing a complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 4/4. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 3 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 17: 115% FTP. You're 51 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 17/20. You've accumulated 26min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 2 blocks left. 18 minutes total. You wanted faster. This is how. Stop thinking, pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 4/4. 72% complete. Hold 95% steady. 18 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 72% complete. Block 4/4. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 18 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Set 4: 2:00 at 95%. Focus on efficient pedal stroke. 2 blocks remaining.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 75% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 19/20. 1:00 at 115%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 17 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 54 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% into session. 115% at 90-100 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. 2:00 at 95%. Then 15min cooldown. Don't you dare fade.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 2:00 at 95%. Then 15min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. 2:00 at 95%. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting threshold work. Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain.' (It doesn't, but it should.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 95% FTP, 90-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 57 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 32min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 79% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 57 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 79% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% for 5:00. Finish strong.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 86% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 86% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 86% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
